overview: A comprehensive Inpui tribal language preservation app with voice contributions, corpus management, community chat, real audio storage, and admin controls to help preserve and grow the Inpui language community.
features: Real audio storage and playback with direct upload support
Community chat for contributors to discuss translations
Multi-admin system with role assignment powers
Admin edit and delete controls over all contributions
Corpus browser with search, filter, and favorites
Flashcard and quiz mode for learning
Contributor leaderboard with badges and streaks
Mobile fieldwork mode with offline sync
